body:
This is our final end-of-quarter FEC deadline before the election. Here's what I'm going to do. |
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/49035898:JjlUnpmcN:m:1:1516426255:C46CB658BA76243B9451D505E09524F8:r)

Peter,

You are our country's only hope.

We are facing the FINAL end-of-quarter fundraising deadline before Election Day. I've set a $20-million goal that we must hit by the end-of-quarter FEC-mandated deadline on September 30 at 11:59 PM.

And because this is such a HUGE deadline, I'm going to write a MATCHING CHECK worth TWO MILLION DOLLARS.

**Now will you step up and help us meet our goal with a generous contribution?**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/49035899:JjlUnpmcN:m:1:1516426255:C46CB658BA76243B9451D505E09524F8:r)
**[CONTRIBUTE $250 = $500 MATCHED](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/49035899:JjlUnpmcN:m:1:1516426255:C46CB658BA76243B9451D505E09524F8:r)**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/49035900:JjlUnpmcN:m:1:1516426255:C46CB658BA76243B9451D505E09524F8:r)
**[CONTRIBUTE $100 = $200 MATCHED](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/49035900:JjlUnpmcN:m:1:1516426255:C46CB658BA76243B9451D505E09524F8:r)**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/49035901:JjlUnpmcN:m:1:1516426255:C46CB658BA76243B9451D505E09524F8:r)
**[CONTRIBUTE $50 = $100 MATCHED](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/49035901:JjlUnpmcN:m:1:1516426255:C46CB658BA76243B9451D505E09524F8:r)**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/49035902:JjlUnpmcN:m:1:1516426255:C46CB658BA76243B9451D505E09524F8:r)
**[CONTRIBUTE $25 = $50 MATCHED](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/49035902:JjlUnpmcN:m:1:1516426255:C46CB658BA76243B9451D505E09524F8:r)**

This is our last chance to secure the resources we need to stop Hillary.

By this time next month, it'll be too late. We'll be just a few days away from Election Day.

We have to act right now.

**And that 's why I'm putting up $2 million of my own money. I need to get your attention. I want you to know how important this FEC deadline is.**

...And I also want you know how invested I truly am in our movement.

I truly believe that this election is our country's last chance to restore American greatness.

But I know that we will prevail. I believe in the American people.

So help me, Peter. Make a contribution -- of any size -- and we will crush this $20-million goal.

[**Please make a contribution before our FINAL END-OF-QUARTER FEC deadline before the election, and I will PERSONALLY MATCH your contribution up to $2 million.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/49035898:JjlUnpmcN:m:1:1516426255:C46CB658BA76243B9451D505E09524F8:r)

Thank you and God bless you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/49035898:JjlUnpmcN:m:1:1516426255:C46CB658BA76243B9451D505E09524F8:r)

Donald J. Trump

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/49035898:JjlUnpmcN:m:1:1516426255:C46CB658BA76243B9451D505E09524F8:r)**

body:
This is our last chance. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4542/1c469400/87145a/357aed7/797657225/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-24_eoq1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-24_eoq1_nd&utm_campaign=eoq1&utm_medium=ema") Friend, This is the final sprint of our grassroots campaign: In just six days, we're closing the books on the last fundraising quarter of 2016. This is our last chance to show Senator Johnson and his right-wing backers the full strength of our organization. I'm proud of what we've built. Wisconsinites have knocked on over 84,000 doors and made over 215,000 phone calls, and made over 102,000 individual contributions to this campaign. I've been to each of Wisconsin's 72 counties at least twice and put more than 60,000 miles on the campaign van -- listening to countless stories along the way. There are just 45 days until Election Day, and I promise you that we'll leave no stone unturned. Our voter contact plan is ambitious -- and it's limited only by the resources we have. That's where you come in. I've asked a lot of you and this grassroots team since we launched this campaign. Today, I'm asking you to dig deep and contribute to our final end-of-quarter fundraising drive. We're still $250,000 short of our goal for the quarter. You can help us get there by making a contribution right now. **[Will you contribute $5 today to help us raise $250,000 by midnight on September 30?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4542/1c469400/87145a/357aed7/797657225/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-24_eoq1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-24_eoq1_nd&utm_campaign=eoq1&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4542/1c469400/87145a/357aed7/797657225/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-24_eoq1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-24_eoq1_nd&utm_campaign=eoq1&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4542/1c469400/87145a/357aed7/797657225/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-24_eoq1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-24_eoq1_nd&utm_campaign=eoq1&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4542/1c469400/87145a/357aed4/797657225/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-24_eoq1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-24_eoq1_nd&utm_campaign=eoq1&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

clean_body: This is our last chance. | "" Friend, This is the final sprint of our grassroots campaign: In just six days, we're closing the books on the last fundraising quarter of 2016. This is our last chance to show Senator Johnson and his right-wing backers the full strength of our organization. I'm proud of what we've built. Wisconsinites have knocked on over 84,000 doors and made over 215,000 phone calls, and made over 102,000 individual contributions to this campaign. I've been to each of Wisconsin's 72 counties at least twice and put more than 60,000 miles on the campaign van -- listening to countless stories along the way. There are just 45 days until Election Day, and I promise you that we'll leave no stone unturned. Our voter contact plan is ambitious -- and it's limited only by the resources we have. That's where you come in. I've asked a lot of you and this grassroots team since we launched this campaign. body:
Make no mistake, what we raise in the next few days sets the tone for the rest of this campaign. Let's make sure it's a winning one. |
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echbaOD~QCAD8BHuOoaECPqDRMN6aaaaIE39BL3NN0xa?n=8@u-wBuB&X=ki3bseplB0_nfhbs.Vvf&s=0&4=&k=729x8zFlli03lhx3lkpVFVihFcmVFmFmFam3l&mFm)

Friend --

**As you know Donald J. Trump is not a politician,** he's a businessman. Throughout the campaign, our family has had to untangle the backwards things that come naturally to career politicians like the Clintons -- _like constant political correctness and Washington doublespeak._

But, there is one thing we are very familiar with: meeting Quarterly Deadlines. **A big part of what makes our business so successful is ALWAYS meeting and exceeding our goals by deadline.**

That's why throughout this campaign we have been adamant about always reaching our target fundraising numbers, especially when it comes to End of Quarter.

Right now, we are just 45 days away from the most important deadline of the campaign. [**We cannot afford to fall short on Friday, Friend. Will you help with a contribution right now?**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echbaOD~QCAD8BHuOoaECPqDRMN6aaaaIE39BL3NN0xa?n=8@u-wBuB&X=ki3bseplB0_nfhbs.Vvf&s=q&4=&k=729x8zFlli03lhx3lkpVFVihFcmVFmFmFam3l&mFm)
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echbaOD~QCAD8BHuOoaECPqDRMN6aaaaIE39BL3NN0xa?n=8@u-wBuB&X=ki3bseplB0_nfhbs.Vvf&s=l&4=&k=729x8zFlli03lhx3lkpVFVihFcmVFmFmFam3l&mFm)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echbaOD~QCAD8BHuOoaECPqDRMN6aaaaIE39BL3NN0xa?n=8@u-wBuB&X=ki3bseplB0_nfhbs.Vvf&s=m&4=&k=729x8zFlli03lhx3lkpVFVihFcmVFmFmFam3l&mFm)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echbaOD~QCAD8BHuOoaECPqDRMN6aaaaIE39BL3NN0xa?n=8@u-wBuB&X=ki3bseplB0_nfhbs.Vvf&s=o&4=&k=729x8zFlli03lhx3lkpVFVihFcmVFmFmFam3l&mFm)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echbaOD~QCAD8BHuOoaECPqDRMN6aaaaIE39BL3NN0xa?n=8@u-wBuB&X=ki3bseplB0_nfhbs.Vvf&s=n&4=&k=729x8zFlli03lhx3lkpVFVihFcmVFmFmFam3l&mFm)**

**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echbaOD~QCAD8BHuOoaECPqDRMN6aaaaIE39BL3NN0xa?n=8@u-wBuB&X=ki3bseplB0_nfhbs.Vvf&s=r&4=&k=729x8zFlli03lhx3lkpVFVihFcmVFmFmFam3l&mFm)**

Quarterly goals are crucial for campaigns like this one because we must report our numbers to the FEC - and those numbers are immediately combed through tooth and nail by the media.

The leftist media is looking for any sign that the momentum for our movement is slowing, and if we don't reach our goal they will have all the ammo they need.

It is critical that loyal supporters like you step forward right away with a donation. [**Your donation of**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echbaOD~QCAD8BHuOoaECPqDRMN6aaaaIE39BL3NN0xa?n=8@u-wBuB&X=ki3bseplB0_nfhbs.Vvf&s=e&4=&k=729x8zFlli03lhx3lkpVFVihFcmVFmFmFam3l&mFm)**[ANY AMOUNT](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echbaOD~QCAD8BHuOoaECPqDRMN6aaaaIE39BL3NN0xa?n=8@u-wBuB&X=ki3bseplB0_nfhbs.Vvf&s=s&4=&k=729x8zFlli03lhx3lkpVFVihFcmVFmFmFam3l&mFm)**[**could be the difference between hitting our target numbers and falling short.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echbaOD~QCAD8BHuOoaECPqDRMN6aaaaIE39BL3NN0xa?n=8@u-wBuB&X=ki3bseplB0_nfhbs.Vvf&s=d&4=&k=729x8zFlli03lhx3lkpVFVihFcmVFmFmFam3l&mFm)

A big part of running a successful business is always meeting deadlines. That's a big part of running a successful campaign, too. [**We need you to help us hit our target by Friday 's End of Quarter deadline at MIDNIGHT.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echbaOD~QCAD8BHuOoaECPqDRMN6aaaaIE39BL3NN0xa?n=8@u-wBuB&X=ki3bseplB0_nfhbs.Vvf&s=4&4=&k=729x8zFlli03lhx3lkpVFVihFcmVFmFmFam3l&mFm)

**Donate ANY AMOUNT you can afford right now to help:**
[**CONTRIBUTE $250**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echbaOD~QCAD8BHuOoaECPqDRMN6aaaaIE39BL3NN0xa?n=8@u-wBuB&X=ki3bseplB0_nfhbs.Vvf&s=j&4=&k=729x8zFlli03lhx3lkpVFVihFcmVFmFmFam3l&mFm) [**CONTRIBUTE $100**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echbaOD~QCAD8BHuOoaECPqDRMN6aaaaIE39BL3NN0xa?n=8@u-wBuB&X=ki3bseplB0_nfhbs.Vvf&s=k&4=&k=729x8zFlli03lhx3lkpVFVihFcmVFmFmFam3l&mFm) [**CONTRIBUTE $50**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echbaOD~QCAD8BHuOoaECPqDRMN6aaaaIE39BL3NN0xa?n=8@u-wBuB&X=ki3bseplB0_nfhbs.Vvf&s=h&4=&k=729x8zFlli03lhx3lkpVFVihFcmVFmFmFam3l&mFm) [**CONTRIBUTE $25**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echbaOD~QCAD8BHuOoaECPqDRMN6aaaaIE39BL3NN0xa?n=8@u-wBuB&X=ki3bseplB0_nfhbs.Vvf&s=i&4=&k=729x8zFlli03lhx3lkpVFVihFcmVFmFmFam3l&mFm) [**CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echbaOD~QCAD8BHuOoaECPqDRMN6aaaaIE39BL3NN0xa?n=8@u-wBuB&X=ki3bseplB0_nfhbs.Vvf&s=p&4=&k=729x8zFlli03lhx3lkpVFVihFcmVFmFmFam3l&mFm)
Friend, this deadline is the most critical one we will face before election day. And make no mistake, what we raise in the next 45 days will set the tone for the rest of the election.

Like in business, successful campaigns cannot miss deadlines. [**Help ensure that we hit our mark on by MIDNIGHT FRIDAY with a donation right now.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echbaOD~QCAD8BHuOoaECPqDRMN6aaaaIE39BL3NN0xa?n=8@u-wBuB&X=ki3bseplB0_nfhbs.Vvf&s=y&4=&k=729x8zFlli03lhx3lkpVFVihFcmVFmFmFam3l&mFm)

Thanks for all you do. **Know that we haven 't forgotten that the heart and soul of this campaign is hard working Americans like YOU.**

[**Stand with us today.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echbaOD~QCAD8BHuOoaECPqDRMN6aaaaIE39BL3NN0xa?n=8@u-wBuB&X=ki3bseplB0_nfhbs.Vvf&s=z&4=&k=729x8zFlli03lhx3lkpVFVihFcmVFmFmFam3l&mFm)

Sincerely,

Eric Trump

P.S. My dad's recent, unprecedented, and astonishing SURGE in the polls has made the media double down on their efforts to destroy this movement. They are terrified that if he wins, their reign of blaming everything on Republicans will come to an end.

We can't give them the ammo they need in the critical days leading up to the election by falling short of our End of Quarter goals.******[Make sure you contribute TODAY](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echbaOD~QCAD8BHuOoaECPqDRMN6aaaaIE39BL3NN0xa?n=8@u-wBuB&X=ki3bseplB0_nfhbs.Vvf&s=f&4=&k=729x8zFlli03lhx3lkpVFVihFcmVFmFmFam3l&mFm)**[**so your contribution helps us reach our goal before the deadline.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echbaOD~QCAD8BHuOoaECPqDRMN6aaaaIE39BL3NN0xa?n=8@u-wBuB&X=ki3bseplB0_nfhbs.Vvf&s=g&4=&k=729x8zFlli03lhx3lkpVFVihFcmVFmFmFam3l&mFm)

subject: A historic endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
We have some historic news: The Indiana State Police Alliance Political Action Committee, which represents 1,100 active and more than 700 retired members, announced their endorsement of John Gregg this week.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5899382794537793536/130745727063558144?utm_campaign=fnd_ispa_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160924_fnd_gq_ispa_ndn__tg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---
Peter, We have some BIG historic news: The Indiana State Police Alliance Political Action Committee, which represents 1,100 active and more than 700 retired members, announced their endorsement of John Gregg this week -- their first endorsement of a Democrat running for governor in history -- and we couldn't be more humbled and honored. The ISPA-PAC joins the PAC of the Indiana Fraternal Order of Police in standing with John and Christina as partners in keeping our communities safe. Now will you show where you stand? **[If you're committed to making Indiana safer for all Hoosiers, will you chip in $5 to help John continue the fight?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5899382794537793536/130745727063558144?utm_campaign=fnd_ispa_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160924_fnd_gq_ispa_ndn__tg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5899382794537793536/130745727063558144?utm_campaign=fnd_ispa_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160924_fnd_gq_ispa_ndn__tg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=) Back when John and Christina released their ambitious "Safe Communities" plan this summer, we knew it was the right plan for Indiana. But it's great to hear members like Wayne Flick tell us that the ISPA PAC agrees, saying, "In John Gregg and Christina Hale, we will have true partners in the Statehouse once again." Together, we can make our communities healthier and safe, but we need your help to keep the momentum going. **[Will you chip in $5 or more to help John Gregg and Christina Hale fight for Hoosier families?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5899382794537793536/130745727063558144?utm_campaign=fnd_ispa_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160924_fnd_gq_ispa_ndn__tg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)** Thanks for your support, Team Gregg
| | [**Chip in $5 ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5899382794537793536/130745727063558144?utm_campaign=fnd_ispa_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160924_fnd_gq_ispa_ndn__tg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: historic moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|
Friend, I have always believed that progress springs from the grassroots up -- not the top down. Real change comes when people band together to demand it. That's been the history of the women's movement, the civil rights movement, the labor movement, the movement for LGBTQ rights and many more.

This 2016 election is an historic moment. Here in Maryland and across our country, we have an opportunity to send a strong and unequivocal message that we choose hope over fear; and unity over division. We must elect Hillary Clinton as president and reject the politics of fear, hate and intolerance being spread by Donald Trump.

During my time in public service, I've worked together with many of you to expand economic and educational opportunities, improve health care, protect our environment, and fight for civil rights in order to build a more perfect union. Whatever the issue -- from generating more good paying jobs, to adopting common sense gun safety measures, to stopping efforts to roll back a woman's right to choose -- the future will be affected by the outcome of this election.

I'm very proud to have supporters like you standing with me. We have come a long way and our goal is almost in sight.

**September 30th is the next significant milestone for our campaign.**

It's the last quarterly FEC deadline before Election Day -- and our last opportunity to show our opponent's SuperPAC friends that we have the strength and resources to face whatever they may throw at us in the final intense weeks of this campaign.

[**Thank you for anything you are able to do to help us meet this latest milestone. Any support received by midnight September 30 will help us deter the SuperPAC vultures who are watching.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ac4/70cdc2ba/471da9c6/3975dc8/4220998383/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em092416&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Thank+you+for+anything+you+are+able+to+d&utm_campaign=em092416&source=em092416")

Our common goal could not be more important -- that on November 9th our state and our country will be ready to move forward to tackle the challenges ahead rather than be dragged backwards.

Thank you for all you do!

Chris
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

[**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ac4/70cdc2ba/471da9c6/3975dc9/4220998383/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em092416&source=em092416") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. body:
This is our last chance. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4574/1c469400/8df902/357acf2/543531261/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-24_eoq1_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-09-24_eoq1_nd-rs&utm_campaign=eoq1&utm_medium=ema") Friend, This is the final sprint of our grassroots campaign: In just six days, we're closing the books on the last fundraising quarter of 2016. This is our last chance to show Senator Johnson and his right-wing backers the full strength of our organization. I'm proud of what we've built. Wisconsinites have knocked on over 84,000 doors and made over 215,000 phone calls, and made over 102,000 individual contributions to this campaign. I've been to each of Wisconsin's 72 counties at least twice and put more than 60,000 miles on the campaign van -- listening to countless stories along the way. There are just 45 days until Election Day, and I promise you that we'll leave no stone unturned. Our voter contact plan is ambitious -- and it's limited only by the resources we have. That's where you come in. I've asked a lot of you and this grassroots team since we launched this campaign. Today, I'm asking you to dig deep and contribute to our final end-of-quarter fundraising drive. We're still $250,000 short of our goal for the quarter. You can help us get there by making a contribution right now. **[Will you contribute $5 today to help us raise $250,000 by midnight on September 30?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4574/1c469400/8df902/357acf2/543531261/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-24_eoq1_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-09-24_eoq1_nd-rs&utm_campaign=eoq1&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4574/1c469400/8df902/357acf2/543531261/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-24_eoq1_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-09-24_eoq1_nd-rs&utm_campaign=eoq1&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4574/1c469400/8df902/357acf2/543531261/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-24_eoq1_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-09-24_eoq1_nd-rs&utm_campaign=eoq1&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4574/1c469400/8df902/357acf3/543531261/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-24_eoq1_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-09-24_eoq1_nd-rs&utm_campaign=eoq1&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

clean_body: This is our last chance. | "" Friend, This is the final sprint of our grassroots campaign: In just six days, we're closing the books on the last fundraising quarter of 2016. This is our last chance to show Senator Johnson and his right-wing backers the full strength of our organization. I'm proud of what we've built. Wisconsinites have knocked on over 84,000 doors and made over 215,000 phone calls, and made over 102,000 individual contributions to this campaign. I've been to each of Wisconsin's 72 counties at least twice and put more than 60,000 miles on the campaign van -- listening to countless stories along the way. There are just 45 days until Election Day, and I promise you that we'll leave no stone unturned. Our voter contact plan is ambitious -- and it's limited only by the resources we have. That's where you come in. I've asked a lot of you and this grassroots team since we launched this campaign. Today, I'm asking you to dig deep and contribute to our final end-of-quarter fundraising drive. We're still $250,000 short of our goal for the quarter. You can help us get there by making a contribution right now. "" "" "" Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" Senator Johnson might have ten right-wing groups, three super PACs, and the NRA supporting his campaign, but they're no match for you. Because of your continued support, we've built the campaign we need to win. Let's show them what a true grassroots campaign looks like. Sincerely, Russ Feingold ""

subject: the things they don’t realize about you, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
Let's prove them wrong | Derek --

I get frustrated when I hear people discount what we’re doing on this campaign -- when they claim that our supporters aren’t energized, or when they straight-up lie and say that we’re bankrolled by billionaires.

That means they don’t see see you, Derek, and don’t recognize all the work you do. They don’t see that it’s our 2.5 million -- and counting! -- grassroots donors who hold us up and keep us going every single day. And they don’t realize that it’s **[your $1](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjY2MDYyMDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgzOTE5NzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)** that keep the lights on at HQ, keep our ads on the air, and keep our organizers connecting with undecided voters in key states like Nevada and Iowa.

Derek, I know just how much you mean to Hillary, to every person working on this campaign, and to all those voters across America who are counting on this team to elect a good, kind, brilliant leader come November.

So let’s prove those naysayers wrong. Let’s show them just how strong, passionate, and ready to win we are by raising more money in these final six weeks than in any comparable stretch thus far this race.

**Can you chip in now to get us going? We’ll make sure every dollar you donate goes to spreading our message over the airwaves, online, and on the ground in our most competitive battleground districts:** [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjY2MDYyMDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgzOTE5NzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks for all you do,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and help us reach our goal of 2.5 million individual grassroots donors by the end of the month:**
| [
